'''Trancret''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Trancret system/Legends|Trancret system]] and the sector capital of the [[Perkell sector/Legends|Perkell sector]]. It was home to the [[Trancrete]]s. The [[Trancret Stock Exchange Swindle]] was pulled off by the [[Red & Black League]] of [[Herstell V]].

{{Planet-stub}}
